title: Middle East live: Netanyahu says US-Iran ceasefire does not include Lebanon
description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu claimed that the two-week US-Iran ceasefire does not include Lebanon. The last-minute diplomacy effort led by Pakistan halts planned US strikes, and talks are set to begin in Islamabad on Friday. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

title: What we know about the two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran
description: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.

title: Netanyahu says US-Iran ceasefire ‘does not include Lebanon’
description: Israeli prime minister welcomes US decision to suspend attacks on Iran, but says the truce does not apply to Lebanon.

title: Iraqis celebrates US-Iran ceasefire as two-week halt in war begins
description: Celebrations have erupted in Iraq following the announcement of a two-week ceasefire between Iran and the US.

title: Climate activist Greta Thunberg slams Trump’s threats against Iran
description: Polls have found that young people in the United States are more sceptical of foreign intervention and war on Iran.

title: Oil prices slide, stocks surge as Trump announces two-week Iran ceasefire
description: Investors welcome the possible resumption of oil and gas flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Iran says talks with US will begin in Pakistan’s Islamabad on Friday
description: Tehran says the negotiations will be based on its 10-point proposal, which calls for control over Strait of Hormuz.

title: How China Built Its Vast Natural Gas Stockpile
description: Natural gas is hard to store, but China has found a way to do it, while also developing alternate suppliers and expanding production at home.

title: Iran ceasefire deal a partial win for Trump - but at a high cost
description: The path to the two-week ceasefire with Iran may have fundamentally altered the way the rest of the world views the US.

title: Oil plunges after US-Iran ceasefire deal to reopen Strait of Hormuz
description: The agreement was announced not long before Trump's Tuesday evening deadline was reached.

title: Iran agrees to open Strait of Hormuz for two-week US ceasefire
description: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says ‘if attacks against Iran are halted,’ then Iran agrees to a US ceasefire.

title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S., Iran and Israel Agree to Cease-Fire
description: The deal came shortly before President Trump’s deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz or face devastation. Israel said the cease-fire did not include Lebanon.

title: NYT сообщила, что США после заявления Трампа приостановили удары по Ирану
description: Американские военные после заявления президента США Дональда Трампа о прекращении огня приостановили удары по территории Ирана, пишет The New York Times.
